one_time_description: Provision for impairment of investments in Sandy Lake Tank Farm Inc., Wasaya Partnership, Wasaya Group Inc., and Northway Camp Lodge
economic_notes: Two government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Sandy Lake Community Development Services Inc. (SLCDSI) and 1944299 Ontario Inc. Investments held in Sandy Lake Tank Farm Inc., Wasaya Partnership, Wasaya Group Inc., and Northway Camp Lodge.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Audited by Heartland CPA LLP in Winnipeg MB. Two GBEs on modified equity basis: SLCDSI and 1944299 Ontario Inc. Net debt position of $8,647,431. Incomplete projects balance of $13,111,845 treated as deferred revenue. Health Canada PAYE of $381,691 not recorded as revenue per reconciliation note. Province is Ontario based on context (Casino Rama reference, Ontario Inc. subsidiary). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $45,465,271 + Health Canada $14,503,788 + Province of Ontario $10,310,861 + CMHC $308,361 = $70,588,281. OSR = $81,960,063 - $70,588,281 = $11,371,782 (includes business enterprises net income and other revenues net of incomplete project transfers).
